description_long: This tree features a thick, polygonal trunk with a dark, almost black bark texture, giving it a stylized and somewhat eerie appearance. The trunk supports a wide, irregular canopy composed of angular, flat branches and sparse, semi-transparent foliage that appears misty and dark green. The branches are gnarled and extend outward in a somewhat chaotic pattern, with some bare twigs visible among the leaves. The foliage is concentrated at the ends of the branches, creating a layered, umbrella-like effect. The base of the trunk is broad and hexagonal, providing a stable foundation. The overall look suggests a tree that might be found in a stylized urban park or as a decorative element in a moody, atmospheric setting.
description: A dark, stylized tree with a thick, polygonal trunk and a wide, misty canopy of sparse, dark green foliage. Gnarled branches and bare twigs add to its dramatic, atmospheric appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick trunk, wide canopy, and a clear view of the gnarled branches and sparse foliage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular spread of the canopy and the layered, misty foliage.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the umbrella-like canopy and the distribution of foliage and branches.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the trunk and the dense, dark foliage with some visible bare branches.
